THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO JR., ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 325 SUTTER STREET #219, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,817.44 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,817.44, STAYED UNTIL JAN-03-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE DISPOSED OF ACCORDING TO LAW. MUTUAL RELEASE. IF DEFT COMPLIES TIMELY WITH TERMS, PLTF SHALL HAVE JUDGMNT DEEMED SATISFIED, OR SET ASIDE & DISMISSED WITH PREJ.
